title: Pandelflot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pandelflot''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle manufacturer operative during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The company made [[luxury limo]]s that were used by government officials.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}}
